scripts.format:check: biome format biome.json package.json release-contract.json apps/desktop/package.json scripts/ensure-electron.cjs scripts/verify-release.cjs apps/desktop/src/renderer/utils/errors.ts apps/desktop/src/renderer/hooks/usePodDrawerResourceLifecycle.ts apps/desktop/src/renderer/hooks/useResourceTableState.ts apps/desktop/src/renderer/hooks/useResourceWatch.ts apps/desktop/src/renderer/components/LazyPanelBoundary.tsx apps/desktop/tests/renderer-controllers.contract.test.cjs
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:renderer && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm --workspace apps/desktop run test:gateway
scripts.test:gateway: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build && npm --workspace apps/desktop run test:gateway
